about: Extensive excavation works, which began in the 2000s and were meticulously carried out by expert archaeologists like digging a well with a needle, have unearthed the secrets hidden beneath the castle. Thanks to these efforts, the lost inner courtyard of the Artuqid Palace, a hidden water distribution system laid with terracotta pipes, period coins, and ceramic fragments were found, illuminating the dark historical periods of Harput with scientific evidence.
